SILVER MACH

What Is SilverMach?

Build, breathe and bleed speed.

SilverMach is a competitive STEM Racing team competing at the STEM Racing Open Nationals 2026 — a national-level stage of the world's largest student engineering competition, endorsed by Formula 1. Beyond designing and racing a miniature F1 car, we operate across engineering, manufacturing, enterprise, branding, marketing, sponsorship acquisition, stakeholder engagement, and project management, proving that success in engineering comes from combining innovation, collaboration, communication, and leadership.

Our mission is to transform ambition into achievement through dedication, collaboration, and disciplined execution. We value curiosity over complacency, progress over perfection, and teamwork over individual success.

Precision

Every measurement, weld, and line of code is held to a standard where the smallest detail can decide the race.

Innovation

We approach every challenge with creative problem-solving, always looking for the smarter, faster way forward.

Performance

Technical excellence and continuous improvement drive everything from our CAD models to our race-day execution.

Professionalism

Inspired by modern motorsport teams, we bring strategic planning and professional execution to every discipline we touch.

The People Behind Silver Mach

Meet the team

“
We don't just want to win races. We want to leave behind a team, a workshop, and a spark that the next generation of engineers can carry forward — just like we did.
SilverMach's Vision With You

Partner tiers & benefits

SilverMach seeks partners who want real visibility where it actually matters: among a highly engaged student audience driving ideas, events, and digital reach. Your support directly powers a platform built for impact, creativity, and consistent exposure across school and online channels. In return, we offer structured sponsorship tiers designed to match your level of involvement with clear, measurable benefits.
